mapper.insert: insert into db_datasource (id, name, description, db_url, db_username, db_password, status, created_at, updated_at) values (#{id}, #{name}, #{description}, #{dbUrl}, #{dbUsername}, #{dbPassword}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: select * from db_datasource order by created_at desc
mapper.update: update db_datasource set name = #{name}, description = #{description}, db_url = #{dbUrl}, db_username = #{dbUsername}, db_password = #{dbPassword}, status = #{status}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
